name: Weber 18" Original Kettle Charcoal Grill 441001 Black: Weather-Resistant, Porcelain-Coated, Steel Grates, 240 Sq. In.
description: The Weber 18' Original Kettle Charcoal Grill 441001 Black is built to stand the test of time. The Charcoal Grill abounds in both necessities and conveniences. This Weber kettle is constructed keeping in mind those BBQ brunches to get the family together. It comes with porcelain-enameled bowl and lid that ensure years of trouble-free use. For the very best outdoor cooking experience, this original kettle is rust-resistant. The adjustable damper controls airflow into the grill to lower or raise cooking temperatures. This kettle grill is fitted with steel cooking grate that is excellent for retaining heat and searing food. When the day is done in the cooking area, the clean-up and maintenance are as easy as the grilling itself. The aluminized steel one-touch cleaning system lets you effortlessly sweep ashes into an aluminum ash catcher under the bowl. The lid handle features a heat shield and spring clip/push pin leg assembly. Cook with the lid down, but when you need to remove it, simply use the hook inside the lid to hang it safely off the side of the bowl. You can now invite your friends, neighbors and loved ones over for some steak, rib and barbecue lunches.
